vehicleSubsystemDeferred: Dogfight state and opposed Pilot roll tracking
Damage Threshold trigger automation for vehicle condition-track prevention or extra condition movement
Starship maneuver sharing and squadron-wide granted actions
Aboard-starship scene context for personal weapon attacks
recommendedNextPatchOrder: Tech/engineering prestige trees: Military Engineer, Saboteur, Improviser, Outlaw Tech, Procurement
Medical/biotech prestige trees: Medic and Shaper
Droid prestige trees: Independent Droid and Droid Commander
Remaining unarmed/martial niche trees: Martial Arts Master / Master of Teras Kasi if not already handled
implementedContextualNotes: Expert Gunner and Great Shot are implemented through existing CombatOptionResolver attack-option metadata and require vehicle/starship weapon context.
Starship Raider is represented as a context-gated attack option that only applies when a caller explicitly supplies aboardStarship context; it does not alter static sheet totals.

Spacehound starship/vehicle weapon proficiency override is implemented in the attack roll and weapon breakdown pipelines; low/zero gravity and space sickness remain GM/player or future environment-context handling.
